description: Source layer registry for classical_sanskrit / bhs / kotodama. Place PDFs under TENMON_DATA_DIR/sources/sanskrit_kotodama/v1/<layer>/<source_id>/original/. page_count=null until ingested.

page_anchor.pdf_page_origin: 1-based physical page index in the PDF (first page = 1).
page_anchor.printed_page_mapping: Optional future sidecar: extracted/meta/printed_page_map.json per source.

extraction_policy.scan_fallback: PDF page rasterization (e.g. api/tools/nas_pdf_pages_ingest_poppler_v1.py) then OCR; do not use ocr_page.sh (KHS-only) for this layer.
extraction_policy.note: Grammar/morphology observation before interpretive layering; no mystical skipping.

BHS / Buddhist Sanskrit dictionary (placeholder — replace with licensed edition metadata)
Kotodama / Tenmon primary corpus slot (placeholder — internal or licensed texts)
